parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When set to one the captures the image stream from the camera or decoder.

parameters.name: driver
parameters.label: Driver
parameters.description: Selects the library to use to interface with the cameras.

parameters.name: device
parameters.label: Device
parameters.description: Select which camera or decoder you want from this menu.

parameters.name: specifyip
parameters.label: Specify IP
parameters.description: When using Allied Vision library allows you to specify the camera address by IP.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.label: IP
parameters.description: The IP address used when Specify IP above is turned on.

parameters.name: options
parameters.label: Options
parameters.description: Opens the options or control panel for the camera. NOTE: Only works when using DirectShow (WDM) cameras.

parameters.name: deinterlace
parameters.label: Deinterlace
parameters.description: Sets which fields to capture.

parameters.name: precedence
parameters.label: Field Precedence
parameters.description: When using Bob (Split) deinterlacing, this selects which field is shown first for each frame.

parameters.name: signalformat
parameters.label: Signal Format
parameters.description: The signal format to capture input at. This is the resolution and the frame rate, as well as if the frames are progressive or interlaced. Note that when using an interlaced format, the rate refers to

parameters.name: quadlink
parameters.label: Quad Link
parameters.description: Used for cards that support quad-link formats. Quad-link esstenially takes 4 inputs and creates one single larger input out of them, for example 4 1080p inputs become a single 4K input.

parameters.name: inputpixelformat
parameters.label: Input Pixel Format
parameters.description: Some capture devices support pixel formats other than 8-bit. For supported devices (Blackmagic Design) this will make the node attempt to use that capability.

parameters.name: inputcolorspace
parameters.label: Input Color Space
parameters.description: Controls what color space the input data will be treated as. It will be converted to the Working when uploaded to the .

parameters.name: inputreferencewhite
parameters.label: Input Reference White
parameters.description: When converting the input color values to the Working Color Space, this controls how they should be treated with respect to . If the Working Color Space is the same White, then no adjustment is done.

parameters.name: transfermode
parameters.label: Transfer Mode
parameters.description: Controls how the frames are transferred from the input device to CPU memory, and how they are transferred from CPU memory to the .

parameters.name: memorymode
parameters.label: Memory Mode
parameters.description: Controls the memory type used to transfer data between the capture card and the .

parameters.name: syncinputs
parameters.label: Sync Inputs
parameters.description: Enabling syncing of multiple Video Device In TOPs. Syncing allows multiple nodes using multiple inputs and capture cards on a single system to ensure they are outputting frames in sync. Without this e

parameters.name: syncgroupindex
parameters.label: Sync Group Index
parameters.description: There can be multiple sync groups active in a file. Nodes will only sync to other nodes that are part of the same sync group.

parameters.name: maxsyncoffset
parameters.label: Max Sync Offset (ms)
parameters.description: Specified in milliseconds. The maximum difference in time two image could have arrived at be considered in-sync. Images that arrive at times more different than this offset will be considered to be pa

parameters.name: synctimeout
parameters.label: Sync Timeout (ms)
parameters.description: How much time to wait for all frames in a sync group to become available before giving up trying to sync. Expressed in milliseconds. If this timeout elapses when waiting for a frame from one or more s

parameters.name: resetstats
parameters.label: Reset Stats
parameters.description: A pulse to reset the statistics in an attached .

parameters.name: refreshdevices
parameters.label: Refreshdevices
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: allowfallback
parameters.label: Allowfallback
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

examples.label: Configure Field Precedence and Device
examples.code:
n = op('videodevicein1')
n.par.precedence = 'even'
n.par.device = 'V1|||6|||6|||0|||OBS Virtual Camera'
n.par.signalformat = 'f640x480p-30.00hz'
examples.description: Common settings from 8 real Derivative examples

examples.label: Alternative configuration
examples.code:
n = op('videodevicein1')
n.par.precedence = 'even'
n.par.device = 'V1|||6|||6|||0|||OBS Virtual Camera'
